word-spell-description: Drag letter tiles to spell the word.
number-match-description: Match numerals to groups by dragging tiles.

instructions.word-spell: Drag the letters into the boxes to spell the word. Tap the picture or the speaker to hear the word.
instructions.number-match: Drag the tiles to match each number. Tap the number to hear it.
instructions.sort-numbers: Put the numbers in order! Drag each number to the right place.
instructions.spot-all: Tap every tile that shows the highlighted character. Some tiles look similar but are flipped or different — only tap the correct ones.
instructions.deleteConfirmBody: This custom game will be removed. You can't undo this.
instructions.nameRequired: Please enter a custom game name.
instructions.nameDuplicate: A custom game with that name already exists.
instructions.saveOnPlayTitle: Save these settings as a custom game?

spot-all-description: Tap all the tiles that match the prompt — watch out for backwards and look-alike letters.

config.invalid-selection: Pick at least one group to play
